<html lang="en" class="dark"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><link rel="icon" href="./favicon.png"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"><title>🐴 WellinOS4.5</title><script>const pathName = location.pathname.endsWith('/') ? location.pathname : location.pathname + '/';
      if (pathName.endsWith('/run/')) {
        sessionStorage.setItem('proxy_pathname', pathName.replace('/run/', '/'));
      } else {
        sessionStorage.setItem('proxy_pathname', pathName);
      }

      const request = new XMLHttpRequest();
      request.open('GET', 'config.json', false);

      try {
        request.send(null);
        window.CONFIG = JSON.parse(request.responseText);
      } catch (e) {
        window.CONFIG = {
          SSL_GATEWAY: false,
          IS_BS: false,
          serverConfig: {
            mode: 1,
            timeout: 0,
            ip: '127.0.0.1',
            port: 8686,
            pathname: '/',
          },
          errorTips: true,
          isEditStateExport: false,
          radio: 2,
        };
      }

      if (sessionStorage.getItem('IS_BS') !== null) {
        window.CONFIG.IS_BS = JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem('IS_BS'));
      } els

title: WellinOS4.0
html:
<html lang="en"><head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="./vite.svg">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>WellinOS4.0</title>
    <script>
      const request = new XMLHttpRequest();
      request.open("GET", "config.json", false);
      request.send(null);
      window.CONFIG = JSON.parse(request.responseText);

      if (sessionStorage.getItem("proxy_pathname") === null) {
        const pathName = location.pathname.slice(
          0,
          location.pathname.indexOf("public")
        );
        sessionStorage.setItem("proxy_pathname", pathName || "/");
      }
    </script>
